descriptions.english: Spend your remaining [ember]. Gain [burst] [trait0.power] for each ember spent.
descriptions.french: Dépense les braises restantes. Octroie [burst] [trait0.power] par braise dépensée.
descriptions.german: Investiere deine übrige [ember]. Erhalte pro investierter Glutasche [burst] [trait0.power].
descriptions.russian: Тратится оставшийся [ember]. Дает [burst] х[trait0.power] за каждый потраченный уголь.
descriptions.portuguese: Gasta suas [ember] restantes. Recebe [burst] [trait0.power] para cada brasa gasta.
descriptions.chinese: 花费你剩余的[ember]。每花费一点余烬，就获得 [burst] [trait0.power]。
descriptions.spanish: Consume tus [ember] restantes. Añade [burst] [trait0.power] por cada ascua consumida.
descriptions.chinese_traditional: 花費你剩餘的[ember]。每花費一點餘燼獲得[burst][trait0.power]。
descriptions.korean: 남은 [ember]을 소모합니다. 소모한 잔불 하나당 [burst] [trait0.power]을 획득합니다.
descriptions.japanese: 残りの[ember]を消費する。消費した炉炭ごとに[burst] [trait0.power]を得る。
